title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. boissieri
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. boissieri, also known as mountain lucerne or vulnerary, is a subspecies of the perennial herb Anthyllis vulneraria, commonly found in mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. boissieri include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
